items: a minimum of 360° rotation, where the handspring should still spin. Rotation is considered from the point where there is no contact with the floor and includes the moment where the inverted position is fixed.
reverse spin starting with one hand on the pole into a twisted grip handspring without making contact with the floor
legs finish in a fixed leg position of choice
back is to the pole for the reverse spin, body moves into inverted position after handspring without changing direction (i.e., turning back), hips must face upwards.
